kpis.name: Ball runs (xT)
kpis.description: Accumulated location-based xT from progressive runs and high speed runs with the ball adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Box entries
kpis.description: Number of ball carries into the penalty area adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Carries (xT)
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT from ball carries adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Deep runs (xT)
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT from through ball receptions adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Penalty area receptions
kpis.description: Number of successful pass receptions inside the penalty area divided by the team's possession percentage and multiplied by 0.5.
